query:
ALTER TABLE establishments 
ADD COLUMN deliveryTimeEnabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN deliveryTimeMin INT DEFAULT 20,
ADD COLUMN deliveryTimeMax INT DEFAULT 60,
ADD COLUMN minimumOrderEnabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN minimumOrderValue DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN deliveryFeeType ENUM('free', 'fixed', 'byNeighborhood') DEFAULT 'free' NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN deliveryFeeFixed DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0;
